5121a20149e04980b554e3ac773919c8.name: New role
5121a20149e04980b554e3ac773919c8.jd_text: We are hiring a Data Scientist with 3+ years of experience in machine learning and statistical modeling. Must be proficient in Python, scikit-learn, pandas, and numpy. Experience with TensorFlow or PyTorch is a strong plus. The role involves building classification and regression models, performing feature engineering, and presenting insights to non-technical stakeholders.
